zh.Bovey Tracey,Devon,England: 英國英格蘭戴文波福 特蕾西
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Bennet於大約1520年出生在英國英格蘭戴文波福 特蕾西時，她的父親John Bennet9歲，母親Margaret Rockliff9歲。她於1549年8月20日與Simonis Covey在英國英格蘭戴文波福 特蕾西結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍登加農。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Bennet于大约1520年出生在英国英格兰戴文波福 特蕾西时，她的父亲John Bennet9岁，母亲Margaret Rockliff9岁。她于1549年8月20日与Simonis Covey在英国英格兰戴文波福 特蕾西结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国北爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍登加農。

nameMeanings.name: Bennet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bennett
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Bennet was born about 1520, in Bovey Tracey, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bennet, was 9 and her mother, Margaret Rockliff, was 9. She married Simonis Covey on 20 August 1549, in Bovey Tracey, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Dungannon, County Tyrone, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Simonis Covey le 20 août 1549, à Bovey Tracey, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Bennetが約1520年にイギリスイギリスデボンボビー トレイセイで生まれた時，父John Bennetは9歳，母Margaret Rockliffは9歳であった。1549年8月20日にイギリスイギリスデボンボビー トレイセイでSimonis Coveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリス北アイルランドコウントイ トイロンダンガノンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Bennet(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 보비 트라스이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bennet(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Rockliff(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1549년 8월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 보비 트라스이에서 Simonis Covey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 타이론 던건넌에서 사망했다.

ru.Dungannon, County Tyrone, Northern Irela: дунганнон, коунти тироун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Bennet родилась около 1520 г. в местности бови треиси, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bennet было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rockliff, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simonis Covey 20 августа 1549 г. в местности бови треиси, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности дунганнон, коунти тироун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания.
